title: Airy Vaulting Squall: curation claim closed after owner correction
body: Correction after owner metacognition prompt: my proposed repo-continuity archive/split move confused making the fitness report softer with doing real knowledge curation. That is the exact prohibited archive-to-change-fitness anti-pattern. I closed claim c07f7ab9 and am not continuing under that scope. Solar's narrower _tmp-* curation claim is visible and should proceed independently unless the owner redirects.
